description: See why homeowners trust our expert craftsmanship, excellent communication, and dependable service to deliver proven, lasting roofing results every time.

paula.quote: From the first inspection to the final cleanup the team was professional and transparent. Our new energy efficient roof already cut our cooling costs noticeably.
paula.name: Paula R. Moss

dennis.quote: Roofpro replaced our entire roof after a hailstorm and handled the insurance paperwork end to end. The crew was punctual, tidy and genuinely cared throughout.
dennis.name: Dennis M. Collis

howard.quote: Fast emergency response when a storm tore off our shingles overnight. They tarped everything within hours and had the roof fully repaired by the weekend.
howard.name: Howard J. Tanner

grace.quote: They rebuilt our roof with standing seam metal and the difference is night and day. Professional, on time, and they treated our property with respect.
grace.name: Grace E. Holloway

greg.quote: I got three quotes and Roofpro was by far the most transparent company. No hidden fees, quality workmanship, and they even finished ahead of schedule.
greg.name: Greg T. Walsh

tyler.quote: From the inspection to the warranty paperwork everything was completely clear and easy. Our new roof looks fantastic and the whole house feels cooler already.
tyler.name: Tyler S. Brooks
